questions.question: Is Lithuania currently warmer or colder than normal?
questions.answer: Based on retrieved DAG outputs, Lithuania Weather Summary The climate model reports R2 0.7969, RMSE 3.8645, and MAE 2.9982 on held-out data.

questions.question: How unusual is this March in Vilnius?
questions.answer: Based on retrieved DAG outputs, Vilnius March Temperature Anomalies Vilnius March through day 20 in 2026 has mean temperature 4.34 C, an anomaly of 4.10 C, and z-score 1.39.
